title: sw-dev-blueprint frozen contracts (scripts/.approved/contracts.json)
description: The machine-readable section of the TPM's ERD: the locked cross-component surface. The TPM authors it in the web chat; the human installs it via scripts/refreeze.sh; no agent can write it (it lives outside every lane and is hash-pinned in scripts/.approved/frozen-manifest). Everything listed here is LOCKED — the EM owns implementation inside these seams and may not invent or alter them. INV-4 additionally requires that the frozen tests observe the system ONLY through surfaces declared here (test-visible surface must be a subset of the locked surface).

erd_version.description: Must equal scripts/.approved/VERSION. Bumped only by refreeze.sh.

files.description: The ERD build inventory: every source file the feature requires, relative to repo root. The plan gate requires exactly one task per listed file — coverage failures surface at validation, not integration.

entry_points.description: Importable symbols tests may use, as 'module' or 'module:symbol' (e.g. 'src.main' or 'src.main:app'). INV-4: any import of src.* in tests/ outside this list fails the surface gate.

id.description: Stable contract id, e.g. 'route:GET /health'. Referenced by plan tasks.

routes.description: HTTP surface. INV-4: any route-shaped string a test sends a request to must appear here.

fields.description: Field name -> type, as locked by the TPM.

schemas.description: Data shapes crossing a seam (request/response bodies, persisted records).
